nl_query: Which boards have all scripts scanned but less than 80 percent of those scripts have been assigned to evaluators, and show the course code, total scripts, assigned count, and assignment gap.
failed_sql:
SELECT b.id AS board_id, au.code AS academic_unit_code, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS total_scripts, COUNT(DISTINCT sa.id) AS assigned_count, (total_scripts - assigned_count) AS script_assignment_gap
FROM   board b
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = b.course_id
JOIN   answer_script a ON a.course_id = au.id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
WHERE  a.lifecycle_status = 'ATTEMPTED' AND a.scan_status = 'SCANNED'
GROUP  BY b.id, au.code
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) * 0.8 < COUNT(DISTINCT sa.id)
ORDER  BY script_assignment_gap ASC LIMIT 100;
